raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "obj must be an object",
    "name must be a string",
    "the attribute name must exist in the object"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the named attribute is deleted from the object",
    "AttributeError is raised if the attribute does not exist",
    "the object is modified in-place"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "deleting a built-in attribute may raise a TypeError",
    "deleting an attribute that does not exist raises an AttributeError",
    "deleting an attribute from an object that does not support attribute deletion raises a TypeError"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
{
  "preconditions": [
    "obj must be an object",
    "name must be a string",
    "name must be a valid attribute name"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the named attribute is deleted from the object",
    "the object's __dict__ attribute is updated"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if obj is None, raise AttributeError",
    "if name is None, raise TypeError",
    "if name is an empty string, raise AttributeError",
    "if obj does not have the named attribute, raise AttributeError"
  ]
}
